title: RenameSkin
description: You ever wanted tool skins in Minecraft? Now you can get them!
body:
You ever wanted tool skins in Minecraft? Now you can get them!

**Important!** The resourcepack requires Optifine
 or CIT

As of right now the resource pack contains only 3 toolsets, but more will be added in the future.

**How does it work?**

If you rename a diamond or netherite tool it gets a texture of the tool
Example: Aztec Sword -> Gets the Aztec Sword texture

![Aztec Sword in anvil](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/653fc238138c76d24aacb005e1da579cc2fe3223.png)

**Possible names:**
- **Aztec** + tool name

![Aztec Tools in inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d1b89da20fc95a6efb4b2fa14e48f9f9f10a5df.png)
- **Maya** + tool name

![Maya Tools in inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22b44b779464f2dc142b110aa6b67f4d23ff1e74.png)
- **Cupid** + tool name

![Cupid Tools in inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29470005ac4e27f7146df6833d9d4becf16e62b6.png)

The resourcepack will get more toolskins in the future

> Massive thanks to Dubgin for making the Aztec tool textures
> 
> Thank you Lanshan 蓝山 for making the Cupid Tools
